summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WTF Agency proposal landing page for Barugel. All major features and interactions working correctly with modern Italian aesthetic.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with WTF Agency logo and Barugel typography
Navigation links scroll smoothly to all sections (#diagnostico, #solucion, #inversion, #resultados)
Heritage badge '90 AÑOS DE HISTORIA + 30 DÍAS DE TRANSFORMACIÓN' displays correctly
Diagnosis section shows 6 diagnostic cards with check/x icons
3 metric cards (97K, Top 3, 0%) visible and responsive
Competitive landscape shows 4 competitor cards with bar animations
Market gaps progress bars animate properly on scroll
Solution timeline displays 3 phases with all items
Investment section shows pricing card ($12,500 USD) clearly
Comparativa de Alternativas shows WTF Agency highlighted correctly
Mobile responsive design works properly across all sections
Scroll animations and hover effects work smoothly
Card hover effects working on all interactive elements
